Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 2,"x", 3,"y", 4,"z" ]; L | join kind=inner R on k
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.rv FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 2,"x", 3,"y", 4,"z" ]; L | join kind=leftsemi R on k

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,11, 2,20 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, w:long)[ 1,100, 1,101, 3,300 ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | order by v asc, w asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(11 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(101 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(300 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, w)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.w FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY v ASC NULLS FIRST, w ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,11, 2,20 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, w:long)[ 1,100, 1,101, 3,300 ]; L | join kind=innerunique R on k | order by v asc, w asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(11 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(101 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(300 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, w)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.w FROM (SELECT * FROM L QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY k) = 1) AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY v ASC NULLS FIRST, w ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(a:long, b:long, lv:string)[ 1,1,"p", 1,2,"q", 2,2,"r" ]; let R = datatable(a:long, b:long, rv:string)[ 1,2,"x", 2,2,"y", 9,9,"z" ]; L | join kind=inner R on a, b
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'p'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'q'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'r')) AS t(a, b, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(9 AS BIGINT), CAST(9 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(a, b, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.a AS a1, R.b AS b1, R.rv FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.a IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.a AND L.b IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.b

Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'p'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'q'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'r')) AS t(a, b, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(9 AS BIGINT), CAST(9 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(a, b, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.a AS a1, R.b AS b1, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.a IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.a AND L.b IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.b ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, c:string)[ 1,"L1", 2,"L2", 3,"L3" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, c:string)[ 1,"R1", 2,"R2", 4,"R4" ]; L | join kind=inner R on k

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, c:string)[ 1,"L1", 2,"L2" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, c:string)[ 1,"R1", 2,"R2" ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on k | project k, c, c1, k1

Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, a)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, b)), C AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, c)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k2, R.c FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.b FROM A AS L INNER JOIN B AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) AS L INNER JOIN C AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:real)[ 1,1.5, 2,2.5 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:real)[ 1,9.5, 3,3.5 ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on k | extend kk = coalesce(k, k1) | order by kk asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1.5 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2.5 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(9.5 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(3.5 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT *, COALESCE(k, k1) AS kk FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.v AS v1 FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY kk ASC NULLS FIRST

Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a')) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1.5 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(x, w)) (SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, '' AS y FROM (SELECT * FROM B))

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long)[ 1, 2 ]; let B = datatable(x:long)[ 2, 3 ]; A | union kind=inner B
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x)) (SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM B)

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:long)[ 1,1, 2,2 ]; let B = datatable(x:long, y:long)[ 2,2, 3,3 ]; A | union B | summarize c = count() by x | order by x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x, y)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT x, COUNT(*) AS c FROM ((SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM B)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long)[ 1, 2, 2 ]; let B = datatable(x:long)[ 2, 3 ]; union withsource=tbl A, B | summarize n = count() by tbl | order by tbl asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT tbl, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ((SELECT *, 'union_arg0' AS tbl FROM (SELECT * FROM A)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, 'union_arg1' AS tbl FROM (SELECT * FROM B))) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY tbl ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,100, 2,200 ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | extend total = v + v1 | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT *, v + v1 AS total FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.v AS v1 FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, ts:datetime)[ 1,datetime(2020-01-01), 2,datetime(2021-06-15) ]; let R = datatable(k:long, ts:datetime)[ 1,datetime(1999-12-31), 3,datetime(2022-01-01) ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '2021-06-15 00:00:00')) AS t(k, ts)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '1999-12-31 00:00:00'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '2022-01-01 00:00:00')) AS t(k, ts)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.ts AS ts1 FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, b:bool)[ 1,true, 2,false ]; let R = datatable(k:long, b:bool)[ 1,false, 3,true ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), TRUE), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), FALSE)) AS t(k, b)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), FALSE), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), TRUE)) AS t(k, b)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.b AS b1 FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long)[ 1, 1, 2 ]; let R = datatable(k:long)[ 1, 1, 3 ]; L | join kind=inner R on k
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1 FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long)[ 1, 1, 2 ]; let R = datatable(k:long)[ 1, 1, 3 ]; L | join kind=innerunique R on k
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1 FROM (SELECT * FROM L QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY k) = 1) AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:long)[ 1,10, 2,20 ]; let M = datatable(k:long, mv:long)[ 1,100, 2,200 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:long)[ 1,1000 ]; L | join kind=inner M on k | join kind=leftouter R on k | order by lv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, lv)), M AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, mv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1000 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k2, R.rv FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.mv FROM L AS L INNER JOIN M AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let B = datatable(y:string, x:long)[ "c",3, "d",4 ]; A | union B | order by x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('c', CAST(3 AS BIGINT)), ('d', CAST(4 AS BIGINT))) AS t(y, x)) (SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM B) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, dyn:dynamic)[ 1,dynamic({"a":1}), 2,dynamic([1,2]) ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:long)[ 1,99 ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), '{"a":1}'::JSON), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), LIST_VALUE(1, 2))) AS t(k, dyn)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(99 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:string, lv:long)[ "1",1, "2",2 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:long)[ 1,10, 2,20 ]; L | extend kk = tolong(k) | join kind=inner R on $left.kk == $right.k | order by lv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('1', CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), ('2', CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.rv FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(k AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(k AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS kk FROM L) AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.kk IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,5, 2,6 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,7, 2,8 ]; let X = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,9 ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | join kind=leftanti X on k | order by v asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(6 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(7 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(8 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), X AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(9 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT L.* FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.v AS v1 FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) AS L WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM X AS R WHERE L.k = R.k) ORDER BY v ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 5,"a", 6,"b" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 7,"x", 8,"y" ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on k | project lk = k, rk = k1, lv, rv | order by lv asc, rv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(5 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(6 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(7 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(8 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT k AS lk, k1 AS rk, lv, rv FROM (SELECT L.k, COALESCE(L.lv, '') AS lv, R.k AS k1, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST, rv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 1,"a" ]; let B = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 2,"b" ]; let C = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 3,"c" ]; union A, B, C | order by x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a')) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, y)), C AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(x, y)) (SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM B) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM C) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST
